hero.headline:
34 Years Keeping Pools Perfect for
Your Family
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be a source of joy, not stress. Putnam Swimming Pool Service has kept families in Fairfield and Westchester Counties swimming worry-free since 1992. Let our certified technicians handle everything so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a<br class="hidden md:block"> Family That Cares
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations, our certified technicians handle every aspect of pool ownership so you can focus on enjoying your backyard.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and filter maintenance to keep your pool sparkling clean, safe, and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Pool Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and structural issues. Most repairs completed same-visit by our certified technicians.

cards.title: Green Pool Recovery
cards.description: Neglected or algae-filled pool? Our specialized treatment restores green pools to crystal-clear, safe swimming conditions fast.

cards.title: Equipment Services
cards.description: Professional installation, maintenance, and repair of filters, pumps, heaters, salt systems, and sanitization equipment.

cards.title: Renovation & Restoration
cards.description: Complete pool renovations including resurfacing, new tile, coping, and modern upgrades to breathe new life into aging pools.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal opening and winterizing services to properly prepare your pool for summer fun or protect it through harsh Connecticut winters.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool Season

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We provide an honest, no-pressure assessment and quote within 24 hours. No contracts ever.

steps.title: Our Certified Team Gets to Work
steps.description: NSPF-certified technicians arrive on schedule with everything needed. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and repairs — all handled professionally.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool All Season
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every week. If something is important to you, it is important to us. That is our promise.

about.label: Why Families Trust Putnam
about.headline: Family Owned Since 1992 — Your Pool Is Personal to Us
about.description: Founded by Jeff Saunders over 34 years ago, Putnam Swimming Pool Service remains a family-owned operation where every client gets personal attention. Our NSPF-certified technicians are extensively trained and licensed across multiple trade disciplines. We serve lower Fairfield County and Westchester County with one guiding principle: if the issue is important to you, it is important to us.

features.title: Extensively Licensed & Certified
features.description: CT HIC, Plumbing, Pool Builder, and Westchester HI licenses. Plus NSPF and APSP certifications for complete peace of mind.

features.title: No Contracts. Ever.
features.description: We earn your trust every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees. Just reliable, professional pool care.

features.title: BBB A+ Rated Business
features.description: Our A+ Better Business Bureau rating reflects 34 years of honest work and satisfied customers throughout our community.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Honest quotes with no hidden fees. Flexible service plans — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime with zero penalties.

guarantee.headline: Our "If It Matters to You" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge. We have stood behind this promise for 34 years because your satisfaction is not just a policy — it is how we have built our reputation in Greenwich and beyond.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Fairfield or Westchester County are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority same-day or next-day response. Call us and we will work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: Never. We do not require contracts of any kind. We believe in earning your business every single visit. You can adjust, pause, or cancel service at any time with zero penalties.

faqs.question: What certifications do your technicians have?
faqs.answer: Our technicians are NSPF certified and APSP members. The company holds CT Home Improvement, Plumbing, and Pool Builder licenses, plus a Westchester County HI license. We carry full liability insurance.

faqs.question: Do you service pools in Westchester County, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes! We are fully licensed in Westchester County (WC-22672-H10) and serve communities throughout lower Westchester including Rye, Port Chester, Harrison, and surrounding areas.

faqs.question: What if my pool has turned green or been neglected?
faqs.answer: Green pool recovery is one of our specialties. We will assess the situation, provide an honest quote, and in most cases have your pool back to crystal-clear swimming condition within 48-72 hours.

testimonials.name: Henry
testimonials.text: Just a word of thanks to Putnam Swimming Pool Service for a really good summer swimming season. The pool was always in great shape and the team was reliable week after week.

testimonials.name: Bill
testimonials.text: You guys did a nice job closing up our pool. Everything was handled professionally and on time. Thank you for making the end-of-season process so easy.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: The Putnam team helped us open the pool at our new home that needed draining, power washing, and some repairs. Very responsive and great to work with.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure assessment from a family business that has served this community for 34 years. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pool care.
benefits: Free pool assessment with every quote
